payload.answer: Cannot store article content because the fetch failed (404/network error) and the URL is malformed.
payload.decision: Do not commit durable content memory; the source could not be fetched and the URL is malformed, so only a transient failure should be recorded.

entity_resolution.reason: No durable source entity can be reliably resolved from the malformed URL and fetch failure.

payload.intent: Remember an article from a malformed URL-like input and assess whether it can be committed to memory.

memory_cards.statement: An attempt was made to remember an article from the input, but the fetch failed with a 404/network error.

details: No article content available to encode as durable memory.

repair_options: Provide a valid URL or article text.
If the goal is to remember the fetch failure itself, store it as a transient event only.
